name: What's the process for workers comp claim in Saint George?
description: Report, file with Labor Commission, hearing if needed.[2]

mainEntity.name: What's the process for workers comp claim in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report, file with Labor Commission, hearing if needed.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report to employer, file application with Utah Labor Commission, attend hearing if disputed.[2] Key factors: (1) Employer/insurer 20 days to respond; (2) Medical exam possible; (3) ALJ decides; (4) Appeal to Commission. Submit forms online, keep records. Lawyer simplifies.
